Then ctrl+* combos are handled in vim settings\\n    { \\\"key\\\": \\\"cmd+a\\\", \\\"command\\\": \\\"extension.vim_ctrl+a\\\", \\\"when\\\": \\\"editorTextFocus && vim.active && vim.use<C-a> &&
